title: Obtain and manage sponsorship
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Obtain and manage sponsorship demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify sponsorship opportunities

pcs.text: Target appropriate partners to the program as potential sponsors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Target appropriate partners to the program as potential sponsors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Target appropriate partners to the program as potential sponsors.

pcs.text: Develop a rationale for sponsoring the program or activities which achieves a balance between sponsor requirements and program goals, and benefits to the sponsor and program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a rationale for sponsoring the program or activities which achieves a balance between sponsor requirements and program goals, and benefits to the sponsor and program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a rationale for sponsoring the program or activities which achieves a balance between sponsor requirements and program goals, and benefits to the sponsor and program.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm feasibility of sponsorship opportunities through research and analysis.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Itemise mutual benefits and develop a list of targets.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider community, cultural and equity requirements of group operations when developing list of target sponsor companies.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow up presentation in a manner that maintains integrity of the negotiations.
